name: DWorm
description: DWorm is a playful real-time visualization game powered by the Flare Network's FTSO (Flare Time Series Oracle), crafted by the ftso.eu team. A curious worm tries to “eat” accurate predictions of selected FTSO price feeds, using a simple regression model. If the predicted price is close enough to the real one , the worm gets a tasty bite. You can switch between different feeds and see how often the worm succeeds. The number of price points adapts to your screen size — less on phones, more on tablets and desktops. Made with ❤️ by ftso.eu.
